vllm.title: [v1] Add encoder-only/cross attention support to Triton Attention backend
vllm.author: Isotr0py
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Motivation

We don't have Whisper support for Turing/Volta GPUs because of FA's cc limit.
Furthermore, FlexAttention's encoder-only attention's speed is still not ideal for FP32.
After xformers deprecation (#29262), we want to add a Triton MMEncoderAttention backend to give a balanced soluti

vllm.title: [Frontend] [Doc] Exclude log deltas feature
vllm.author: Catacomba
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Add a --exclude-log-deltas flag to the vllm serve command. When enabled, this flag suppresses logging of intermediate deltas during streaming and logs only the final output instead. This option requires that --enable-log-outputs and --enable-log-requests are already enabled.
Test Plan


Run

vllm.title: [Bugfix][CPU] Fix RotaryEmbedding fallback causing gibberish with --enforce-eager
vllm.author: ricky-chaoju
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Fix gibberish output on CPU backend when --enforce-eager is enabled.
resolve #31626
When running vLLM on the CPU backend with --enforce-eager, models may produce incoherent or repetitive outputs.
This happens because enforce_eager=True sets custom_ops="all", enabling CustomOp dispatch on CPU

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Add missing extra_tensors arg to DeviceCommunicatorBase.disp…
vllm.author: kzwrime
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Fix #31642.
This bug occurs with MoE models and dp > 1 on the CPU backend or other backends that do not implement dispatch().
Reason:
The DeviceCommunicatorBase.dispatch method was missing the extra_tensors
argument in its signature, causing a signature mismatch (TypeError) when
called from

vllm.title: Triton Attention: Support cross-layers blocks
vllm.author: orozery
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR enables cross-layer blocks for the triton attention backend.
An accuracy test is added to the CPU KV offloading test.

vllm.title: [Misc] Enable Paligemma's PrefixLM attention mask computation
vllm.author: Isotr0py

Purpose

Previously, we disabled Paligemma's PrefixLM attention because FlexAttention doesn't support soft cap
After #30386, we can enable it through Triton Attention backend with soft cap now.

vllm.title: [BugFix] Fix architecture flags to prevent issues on SM103
vllm.author: LopezCastroRoberto
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR fixes the remaining occurrences of the 10.0a GPU architecture flag when targeting SM103.
Changes:

Replaced 10.0a with 10.0f when building with CUDA ≥ 13.0.
Added 10.3a to the architecture list for earlier CUDA versions to maintain compatibility with SM103.

vllm.title: pin lora_b moe weights on cpu
vllm.author: gnovack
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
The current weight loading logic in FusedMoE3DWithLoRA permutes the LoRA B weights on CPU before copying to GPU, this results in a slow copy of non-contigous, pageable memory (see below):

This PR moves the LoRA B weight permutation logic one layer up, into the model manager's activate_adapt

vllm.title: [docker] install cuda13 version of lmcache and nixl
vllm.author: soodoshll
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fix #30628.
Purpose
This PR modifies the Dockerfile to install nixl-cuda13 when using CUDA13. The nixl package looks for two sub-packages  nixl-cuda13 and  nixl-cuda12 in order, and uses the first found one.
lmcache  triggers compilation from source when installed on arm64, therefore some dependency
